title: cmake-format Configuration
description: Configuration file for cmake-format CMake formatter (.cmake-format.yaml)

tab_size.description: Number of spaces per indentation level

use_tabchars.description: Use tab characters instead of spaces

fractional_tab_policy.description: How to handle fractional indentation when using tabs

max_subgroups_hwrap.description: Max sub-groups before forcing vertical layout

max_pargs_hwrap.description: Max positional arguments before forcing vertical layout

max_rows_cmdline.description: Max lines for cmdline positional group without nesting

separate_ctrl_name_with_space.description: Space between control flow keywords and opening parenthesis

separate_fn_name_with_space.description: Space between function/macro names and opening parenthesis

dangle_parens.description: Place closing parenthesis on its own line for wrapped statements

dangle_align.description: Alignment reference for dangled closing parenthesis

min_prefix_chars.description: Min command name length to reject nested layouts

max_prefix_chars.description: Max command name excess over tab_size to reject un-nested layouts

max_lines_hwrap.description: Max lines for horizontal-wrap layout before rejection

always_wrap.description: Commands that should always use vertical layout

enable_sort.description: Enable lexicographic sorting of sortable argument lists

autosort.description: Infer whether argument lists are sortable

require_valid_layout.description: Exit with error when content cannot fit within line_width

markup.description: Comment markup parsing and reflow options

enable_markup.description: Enable comment markup parsing and reflow

bullet_char.description: Character used for bullet list items in comments

enum_char.description: Character used after enumeration numbers in comments

first_comment_is_literal.description: Treat the first comment in a file as literal (not reflowed)

literal_comment_pattern.description: Regex pattern to identify literal comments

canonicalize_hashrulers.description: Normalize hash-ruler lines to canonical length

emit_byteorder_mark.description: Emit a UTF-8 byte-order mark at the start of output

input_encoding.description: Character encoding for reading input files

output_encoding.description: Character encoding for writing output files
